tests.precondition: User is logged out, on the /login page.

steps.action: Type "tanweer@test.com" into [data-test=email] and "tanweer123" into [data-test=password], then click [data-test=login-submit].
steps.expectedResult: User is redirected away from /login; navbar shows [data-test=nav-user-name] instead of [data-test=nav-sign-in].
Sign-out option is present, confirming an active session.

tests.summary: Auth: login with wrong password shows error
tests.precondition: User is logged out, on the /login page.

steps.action: Type "tanweer@test.com" into [data-test=email] and an incorrect password into [data-test=password], then click [data-test=login-submit].
steps.expectedResult: [data-test=login-error] displays an error message; user remains on /login.
[data-test=nav-sign-in] is still shown; no session was created.

tests.precondition: User is logged out, on the /register page, using an email not already registered.

steps.action: Fill [data-test=first-name], [data-test=last-name], [data-test=email] (unique), [data-test=password], and the remaining required fields, then click [data-test=register-submit].
steps.expectedResult: A "Registration Successful!" confirmation panel replaces the form, showing "Your account has been created successfully. Please log in to continue." and a "Click here to Sign In" link to /login. The navbar still shows [data-test=nav-sign-in] - registration does not auto-login (verified live: 2026-07-05).

steps.action: Click the "Click here to Sign In" link.

tests.precondition: User is logged in (e.g. via demo credentials); navbar shows [data-test=nav-user-name] and the cart contains at least one item ([data-test=cart-quantity] > 0).

steps.expectedResult: Cart badge reads 0 - logout clears the cart (logout() calls clearCart() by design), not just the session.
